task_name: D3 Strategy Status Audit — Read-only Artifact-Backed API Route
no_db_query_proof: Route function _load_d3_strategy_status_audit_payload() reads only from a static JSON file at _D3_STRATEGY_STATUS_AUDIT_PATH. No sqlite3, DatabaseManager, or DB connection is imported or used within this function or the route handler.
no_ui_implementation_proof: No UI files, index.html, or frontend assets were modified in P258N.
no_d3_execution_proof: Route does not import or call lottery_api.research.d3_gate.integration_skeleton.run_contract_validation_flow() or any executable D3 module. No candidate methods are run.
no_real_candidate_methods_proof: Payload is a static artifact with all d3_contract_status values set to NOT_EVALUATED_BY_D3 or NOT_APPLICABLE_HISTORICAL_ARTIFACT. No real candidate method outputs are used.
no_null_generation_proof: No null generation code exists in the route. No random, numpy, or scipy imports are introduced.
no_p_values_proof: No statistical computations exist in the route.
no_paired_tests_proof: No paired tests or McNemar tests exist in the route.
no_backtests_proof: No backtest logic exists in the route.
no_recommendation_production_registry_pr: Route does not import recommendation, production, registry, controlled_apply, or deployment modules.
safety_disclaimers_present: D3 is not a prediction model.
Contract validation is not strategy evaluation.
Passing contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.
This API is historical/read-only evidence, not betting advice.

future_task_split.next_allowed_task: P258O: read-only UI display implementation only, if explicitly authorized
future_task_split.running_d3_on_real_candidate_methods: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258O
